global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with geometric shapes and bold text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to engage with the StarVault platform.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large square and an oval shape are centered on the background, outlined in a lighter shade.

elements.label: Small circles
elements.description: Two small circles are placed near the bottom of the main subject, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Main text
elements.description: The text 'Stream the hype' is prominently displayed in a bold, white font across the center of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Start now' is located at the bottom center, designed to stand out with a contrasting color.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The acronym 'UGC' is displayed in a bold font at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: The phrase 'Cancel anytime' is positioned below the main text, providing additional context in a smaller font.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The word 'StarVault' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad in a bold, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Secondary CTA
elements.description: A smaller button with the text 'Start now' is located at the bottom center, inviting immediate action.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: The 'UGC' label is styled as an icon, indicating a focus on user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, StarVault, Stream the hype, Start now
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline 'StarVault' is at the top, followed by the main text 'Stream the hype' in the center, with the CTA 'Start now' at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype, Cancel anytime, StarVault, Start now, UGC
